category_title: Quiet, independent students with LD who struggle with idea generation and persistence in writing
scenario_title: Independent writing initiation in a noisy classroom
minimal_context: Tyrone is sitting at his desk during independent writing time in a noisy classroom, tasked with analyzing a prompt and writing a first draft.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We have thirty minutes for independent writing now. Please analyze the prompt from the mini-lesson and start writing your first draft.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly at his desk looking at the blank paper without writing anything.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright, keep working on getting your ideas down.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to sit quietly without being able to start writing. He looks around the noisy classroom, puts his pencil down, and gives up on generating ideas.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We have thirty minutes for independent writing now. Please analyze the prompt from the mini-lesson and start writing your first draft.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly at his desk looking at the blank paper without writing anything.)

TUTOR: How is your writing going?

STUDENT: Great.

TUTOR: Alright, keep working on getting your ideas down.

STUDENT: (Continues to sit quietly without being able to start writing. He looks around the noisy classroom, puts his pencil down, and gives up on generating ideas.)

task.content: Thirty minutes of writing time following a ten to twenty minute mini-lesson, analyzing a prompt and writing a first draft
task.learning_goal: Generating and articulating ideas to write a first draft

context.environment: Classroom with a noisy atmosphere during daily writing class (8:00-9:00 am)
context.time_context: Start of the thirty minutes of writing time

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When having trouble generating and articulating ideas at the start of the writing task
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Would often sit quietly without being able to start writing and gave up writing easily
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Found it difficult to concentrate in a noisy atmosphere

behavior_patterns.condition: Whenever asked how his writing was going during writing time
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Did not like to ask for help, maintained a good attitude, and would respond, 'Great.'
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Preferred working alone and was a more independent writer
